meaning: n.刻度盘,钟面,转盘,(自动电话)拨号盘v.拨
examples: I can't get a dial tone on this phone.
She picked up the receiver and started to dial.
Broadband is still more expensive than dial-up services.
An arrange of function indicators supplement the music disc and time display on the dial.
Twisting an imaginary dial to raise the volume of music playing from a radio or TV.
